since_last: 56% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.29%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.08% · Gold +0.34% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 56% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.29%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.29%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +17.15%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +17.15%, QCOM +12.38%, LRCX +6.88%, AMAT +6.88%, ARM +6.38%. Laggards: BABA -2.89%, BIDU -1.70%, SAP -1.66%, GOOGL -1.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.90% at $155.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
